posts.author: katya_ig (Katerina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I am developing a Chrome extension that will connect to monday.com and allow users to select a board or doc to populate a form with data stored on that board.

What do you think about this feature? Could you perhaps suggest a form and board structure that you are currently using and would make sense for this, or would it be better if the app included a template where users could enter the necessary data, which would then be pulled from there?

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Katerina, what is the use case for this?
